name: onlyccfa
description: Chrome extension that displays CCF ranks and filters Google Scholar to CCF-A papers by default.

scripts.format:check: prettier --check README.md PrivacyPolicy.md manifest.json package.json package-lock.json _locales/**/*.json css/filter.css css/style.css data/openRankSources.js js/apiCache.js js/ccf.js js/fetchRank.js js/filter.js js/rankSources.js js/scholar.js scripts/package-release.js test/**/*.js .github/workflows/*.yaml
scripts.test: node test/filter.test.js && node test/scholar.test.js && node test/ccf.test.js && node test/rankSources.test.js
